Hoshizora Robotics KK — Data Export Approval & DPA Schedule (APPI) for HR/Securities Workflows
Contact: Ms. Ayumi Nara (Data Protection Officer), privacy@hoshizora.example, +81-50-1234-5678
Scope: employee onboarding forms, board acquisition diligence data room, and investor relations mailing list for the Hinode Exchange growth market.
PII categories: name, corporate email, employee ID, attendance; Specific Personal Information (My Number) used only for payroll/tax and kept in Japan; My Number is never transferred cross-border.
Cross-border transfer: approved export of non-My Number employee data to Sakura Payroll Systems Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) via AES-256 encryption and access keys; prior consent obtained under APPI cross-border rules and records kept.
Consent withdrawal: employees may revoke overseas provision at any time; as of 2026-05-10, three withdrawals were completed and those profiles were excluded from subsequent exports.
DSAR: Mr. Kenji Aoba requested disclosure and erasure on 2026-04-03; response issued on 2026-04-15; attendance logs over 3 years old were erased; tax documents were retained as legally required.
Retention/minimisation: onboarding collects only needed fields; My Number retained for seven fiscal years then deleted; board due diligence files retained for one year post-closing; IR mailing list entries deleted within 72 hours of unsubscribe.
MNPI controls (FIEA): undisclosed enumerated material facts, any tender-offer facts related to the planned Omega Microsystems KK share acquisition, and employee stock option grant schedules were ring-fenced; exported datasets contained none of the above and were pre-cleared by Compliance.
Negative control: no biometric identifiers or precise geolocation are collected in these workflows.
Vendor commitments: SCCs are not used; the DPA Annex requires APPI-compliant foreign transfer safeguards, no onward transfer without approval, and quarterly audit logs; the 2026-03-31 audit reported no findings.
Third-party provision record: Jul 2025–May 2026 logs show exports only to Sakura Payroll; no transfers to marketers or group companies occurred.
Board materials: minutes contain director names with honorifics, but only redacted internal copies are circulated; external counsel received anonymised versions stored on Tohoku Legal Partners LLP servers in Tokyo.
Completed control: the acquisition data room for Omega Microsystems KK closed and was wiped on 2026-05-01; the wipe certificate is archived and there is no ongoing transfer from that environment.
Rights exercise: submit requests to privacy@hoshizora.example; we handle access, correction, utilisation stop, and erasure under APPI within statutory timeframes.
